FileProcessor deployment bundle: IN-SSW-ROLLS_Test-MFTA01193T
Inbound XML → CSV (test, MFTA01193T)

Flows in config/flows.yaml: ssw_inbound, emcs_arc_all
Shared input_dir: E:\FTP\AMFT_Test\IN\MFTA01193T\IN

Reference flows.yaml: scripts/deployment-examples/IN-SSW-ROLLS_Test-MFTA01193T/flows.yaml

Install: see INSTALL.md and WINDOWS_SERVICE_GUIDE.md
Run: python -m file_processor.cli run-daemon-mode config/flows.yaml -v
